buildCommand: cd ../.. && pnpm --filter @amisimedos/db build && pnpm --filter @amisimedos/auth build && pnpm --filter @amisimedos/billing build && pnpm --filter @amisimedos/ui build && pnpm --filter @amisimedos/sync build && pnpm --filter @amisimedos/chat build && cd apps/web && node scripts/vercel-engine-hack.js && next build --webpack
